description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, clad in light-colored horizontal siding. The house features a flat roof and several windows of varying sizes, with a prominent large window facing the front. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, with a white car parked outside and a sidewalk running parallel to the street. The front yard is landscaped with two large leafy trees and a small patch of grass, while the backyard is enclosed and contains additional windows and a back door. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms including a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathroom, all furnished in a modern, minimalistic style.
description: A single-story, light-sided suburban house with a flat roof, large front window, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the driveway, parked car, sidewalk, and a single large tree near the street.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, displaying the main entry door, two large trees in the yard, and the prominent front window.
description_view_2: View 2 captures the house from the rear, showing the backyard, back door, and additional windows, with the driveway and car visible in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct view of the front facade, emphasizing the garage, driveway, main entry, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with no porch, flanked by large windows and accessed via a paved driveway and walkway.
